title: cienfuegosia sulfurea var. genuina
intro: Cienfuegosia sulfurea var. genuina, commonly known as the Yellow Desert Marigold or Sulfur Bush, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. The plant is known for its bright yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia sulfurea var. genuina include relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
